name: Pickled Cherries with Hyssop
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Large sweet or sour cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the cherries, discarding any soft or blemished ones.
2. Trim stems to 1/2 inch and prick each cherry.
3. Prepare the jars, lids, and boiling water bath.
4. Put three sprigs of hyssop into each hot, dry jar.
5. Fill the jars with cherries, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
6. Combine the vinegar, sugar, and salt in a non-reactive pan.
7. Bring to boil over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar and salt are dissolved.
8. Pour the solution into jars, just covering the cherries.
9. Wipe the rims with a clean towel and attach lids securely.
10. Place the jars in boiling water bath.
11. Process for 15 minutes when the water has returned to a boil.
